activities.description: Detects completed activities across all facets and writes records with synthesized descriptions
activities.title: Activity Records

activity.description: Synthesizes segment activity from screenshots and audio, focusing on observable changes and searchability.
activity.title: Activity Synthesis

activity_state.description: Detects configured activities present in segment and tracks state across segments
activity_state.title: Activity State

anticipation.description: Extracts structured anticipation events (future scheduled items) from insight summaries.
anticipation.title: Anticipation Extraction

daily_news.description: Creates a crisp TL;DR briefing highlighting the day's top activities across all facets, delivered to inbox
daily_news.title: Daily News Briefing

daily_schedule.description: Analyzes activity patterns to identify optimal times for scheduled maintenance tasks.
daily_schedule.title: Maintenance Window

decisionalizer.description: Analyzes the day's top decision-actions to create detailed dossiers identifying gaps and stakeholder impacts
decisionalizer.title: Decision Dossier Generator

decisions.description: Tracks consequential decision-actions that change state, plans, resources, responsibilities, or timing in ways that affect other people.
decisions.title: Decision Actions

default.description: Interactive assistant for searching, exploring, and understanding journal entries across all facets
default.title: Journal Chat

documentation.description: Finds when important knowledge is shared in the transcript and suggests what should be written down. Output is a Markdown list of documentation opportunities with time ranges and destinations.
documentation.title: Documentation Moments

entities.description: Extracts people, companies, projects, and tools from segment content
entities.title: Entity Extraction

entities:entities.description: Mines journal for entity mentions and records facet-scoped detections with day-specific context
entities:entities.title: Entity Detector

entities:entities_review.description: Reviews detected entities and promotes recurring ones to attached status
entities:entities_review.title: Entity Reviewer

entities:entity_assist.description: Quick entity addition with intelligent type detection and automatic description generation
entities:entity_assist.title: Entity Assistant

entities:entity_describe.description: Research and generate single-sentence descriptions for attached entities
entities:entity_describe.title: Entity Description

entities:entity_observer.description: Extracts durable factoids about attached entities from journal content
entities:entity_observer.title: Entity Observer

facet_newsletter.description: Creates comprehensive daily newsletters for each facet, capturing activities, progress, and insights
facet_newsletter.title: Facet Newsletter Generator

facets.description: Classifies segment activity into relevant facets based on other segment outputs
facets.title: Facet Classification

files.description: Reviews the day's transcript to capture each significant file or attachment that was opened, saved or shared. Generates a Markdown timeline with context about how the file was used.
files.title: File Interactions

flow.description: Summarizes the overall flow of the workday. Looks for patterns in focus, energy, context switching and highlights productivity insights in a Markdown report.
flow.title: Day Overview

followups.description: Detects promised tasks, commitments, and reminders for future action within each activity. Outputs a concise Markdown list of follow-ups with context.
followups.title: Follow-Up Items

help.description: Answer questions about sol commands and usage
help.title: CLI Help

joke_bot.description: Mines the analysis day's journal for poignant moments and crafts a personalized joke delivered via message
joke_bot.title: Joke Bot

knowledge_graph.description: Extracts people, projects, tools and other entities from the transcript and maps how they relate. Produces a Markdown report plus narrative describing network hubs and bridges discovered during the day.
knowledge_graph.title: Knowledge Graph

media.description: Identifies when videos, articles, music or social content are consumed. Classifies each instance as work or personal and reports the source in chronological sections.
media.title: Media Consumption

meetings.description: Produces detailed meeting notes for each meeting activity, including participants, topics discussed, action items, and presentation details.
meetings.title: Meeting Notes

messaging.description: Extracts contacts, channels, apps, and message content from completed messaging and email activities.
messaging.title: Messaging Summary

occurrence.description: Extracts structured occurrence events from insight summaries.
occurrence.title: Occurrence Extraction

onboarding.description: Guided setup for new users — offers passive observation or conversational interview
onboarding.title: Onboarding

opportunities.description: Scans conversations and tasks for sparks of new ideas, problem statements and potential ventures. Outputs a list of the most promising opportunities with context and suggested next steps.
opportunities.title: Innovation Opportunities

research.description: Highlights moments where additional information would help progress work. Produces a list of targeted research tasks with time ranges and context.
research.title: Research Needs

schedule.description: Identifies all future calendar events and scheduled activities noted in transcripts. Extracts dates, times, participants, and event details for anything scheduled beyond today.
schedule.title: Upcoming Schedule

screen.description: Creates a detailed documentary record of screen activity. Focuses on the 'what' - chronological account with preserved details, excerpts, and entities.
screen.title: Screen Record

speakers.description: Detects meetings in the segment and extracts participant names from screen and conversation.
speakers.title: Meeting Speakers

timeline.description: Constructs a detailed chronological timeline documenting every activity, task shift, and event throughout the workday. Creates a comprehensive historical record with rich descriptions of what happened when.
timeline.title: Day Timeline

todos:daily.description: Carries forward unfinished tasks, aggregates per-activity todo detections, validates completions against journal evidence, and prioritises the day's checklist.
todos:daily.title: Daily TODO Curator

todos:todo.description: Detects todo items from activity transcripts and validates existing todos against activity evidence via sol call commands.
todos:todo.title: TODO Detector

todos:weekly.description: Audits the past week's journal follow-ups to confirm completions and surface the next five high-impact todos for today.
todos:weekly.title: TODO Weekly Scout

tools.description: Catalogues every application or service used throughout the day and how long it was active. The report details which tools are critical, supporting or distracting.
tools.title: Tool Usage

triage.description: Quick-action assistant for the chat bar — handles navigation, todos, calendar, and entity lookups
triage.title: Triage
